nasb.text: “Wander away from the midst of Babylon And go forth from the land of the Chaldeans; Be also like male goats at the head of the flock.

esv.text: “Flee from the midst of Babylon, and go out of the land of the Chaldeans, and be as male goats before the flock.

cnv.text: 我的子民哪！你們要從巴比倫中間逃跑， 從迦勒底人的地出來； 要像公山羊走在羊群前面。

ccb.text: 我的子民啊，你们要逃离巴比伦，离开迦勒底人的土地，要像带领羊群的公山羊一样离开。
